channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network 新作 Ghost Shell 动画 Casts Atsushi Miyauchi
item.description: Miyauchi plays Borma ― The official website for the Ghost in the Shell (Kōkaku Kidōtai THE GHOST IN THE SHELL) television anime from Science SARU revealed on Wednesday that Atsushi Miyauchi plays... | 来源: ANN | 原文: New Ghost in the Shell Anime Casts Atsushi Miyauchi

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Hiroyasu Kobayashi, SAFEHOUSE, AREA35 Unveil Tiny Metal: Zero Line 动画
item.description: World premiere of pilot episode debuted at Japan Expo in France on July 9 ― Studio Khara's Hiroyasu Kobayashi unveiled the new Tiny Metal: Zero Line anime, based on AREA35's Tiny Metal turn-based... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Hiroyasu Kobayashi, SAFEHOUSE, AREA35 Unveil Tiny Metal: Zero Line Anime

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Junket Bank TV 动画 公开 2 新作 声优阵容 Members

item.title: [动画][PV][CAST][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Mercedes Waning Moon 动画 公开 TV Format, 1st 宣传视频 Video, 声优阵容 & 制作阵容 Members, January 2027 Debut
